# rustfs_serviceaccount (Resource)

Manage ServiceUser/API Keys

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `access_key` (String) Access Key
- `name` (String) Visible name, only for viewing
- `secret_key` (String) Secret Key

### Optional

- `description` (String) Short description of the scope we plan to use this token
- `policy` (Attributes) Inline policy scoping this service account's permissions. If omitted, the account inherits the target user's policy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policy))
- `user` (String) Optional user the token should be scoped to. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

<a id="nestedatt--policy"></a>

### Nested Schema for `policy`

Required:

- `statement` (Attributes List) The single statement that makes up this policy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policy--statement))

Read-Only:

- `version` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--policy--statement"></a>

### Nested Schema for `policy.statement`

Required:

- `action` (Set of String)
- `effect` (String)
- `resource` (Set of String)

## Import

Import is supported using the access key:

```
terraform import rustfs_serviceaccount.my_sa my-access-key
```
